name: postercast
description: A poster/flyer gallery plugin for WordPress.

scripts.zip: npm run build && rm -f postercast.zip && zip -r postercast.zip . -x 'node_modules/*' '.git/*' '.claude/*' 'docs/*' 'poster-gallery-pro/*' 'package-lock.json' '*.DS_Store' '.gitignore'
scripts.zip:pro: cd poster-gallery-pro && npm run build && npm run zip
